secret.title: Hooray!
secret.message: You found the easter egg! Look at you clicking on everything possible. You must be really bored :P

days.label: ✈️ Flight Day
days.message: Safe travels today! Sam and I miss you already!

days.label: Day 2
days.message: You made it! I hope you have a great first day! Send lots of pics! Love you!

days.label: Day 3
days.message: I hope you're taking good care of GB so far! Lots of pottery time planned for me today :P

days.label: Day 4
days.message: I can't wait to go to the Olympics with you! Hurry up and come home so we can celebrate getting tickets :)

days.label: Day 5
days.message: Happy Sunday! I'm adding some stuff to your app. Hope you like it!

days.label: Day 6
days.message: Only a week left! Not that I'm counting down the days or anything ;)

days.label: ✈️ FINALLY!
days.message: Today's the best day! I can't wait to see you. Hurry up and come home! Save travels! I love you!
